overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking across a bamboo bridge over a misty hot spring with traditional Japanese temple architecture visible through the fog. The scene features atmospheric volumetric fog, dense bamboo forests, and cinematic lighting typical of the game's visual style.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo bridge crossing misty hot spring

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily across bamboo bridge toward the misty hot spring and temple

entered.detail: narrow bamboo bridge with wooden slats crossing over the hot spring
steaming hot spring water with thick fog rising from the surface
large wooden temple structure with curved roof visible through the mist
dense bamboo grove surrounding the hot spring area
traditional stone toro lanterns standing in the hot spring water

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a narrow bamboo bridge over a steaming hot spring. Dense fog rises from the turquoise water, partially obscuring stone lanterns and a traditional wooden temple in the background. Bamboo forests frame the scene on both sides.

events.description: camera shifts from behind to left side view as character turns left

agents.ego_description: character turns left while continuing to walk, revealing his side profile and swords

segments.scene_description: As the character continues across the bridge, he turns left and the camera shifts to a side view. The temple building moves to the left side of the frame while the misty hot spring expands to the right. The dense fog continues to drift across the water as the character progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused path across a bridge and expands into a wider view of a misty sanctuary. It begins with the samurai walking along a narrow bamboo bridge over a steaming turquoise hot spring, where dense fog partially obscures stone lanterns and a traditional wooden temple. As the character continues forward, the camera shifts to a side view, causing the temple architecture to slide toward the left of the frame. The scene then opens up to the right, revealing the full expanse of the drifting mist over the water as the character progresses. Finally, the surrounding bamboo forests frame the widening vista of the steaming springs and ancient structures.
